details.effect: [fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. From among them, you may reveal up to 1 Mage follower and up to 1 Mage spell and add them to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. [act] [engage]: You may put a [runecraft] spell from your hand into your EX area. It costs 3 less to play this turn. Activate only if there are at least 5 Mage followers in your cemetery.

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Worldreaver's Descent & Dominion of Darkness"
details.effect: On Evolve - Discard a card: Give your leader [defense]+2. During your turn, whenever you discard 1 or more cards, select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Worldreaver's Descent & Dominion of Darkness"
details.effect: Ward. [fanfare] Bury the top 2 cards of your deck. [act] [cost01]: Summon this card from your cemetery. Give it "[lastwords] Banish this card." Activate only if there are at least 10 cards in your cemetery and no cards named Gremory, Death Teller on your field.

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Worldreaver's Descent & Dominion of Darkness"
details.effect: On Evolve - Choose one. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of Machina followers on your field. (2) Give this follower Storm.

details.cardSet: Combined Set "Worldreaver's Descent & Dominion of Darkness"
details.effect: When this card is discarded, [engage] a Naterran Great Tree on your field: Select a Natura card not named Natur Al'machinus in your cemetery and add it to your hand. ---------- [fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Machina card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area. Recover 3 play points.
